description: CI workflows + lockfile in same PR - ci and config domains mixed
rationale: .github/workflows/*.yml files = ci domain. pnpm-lock.yaml and pnpm-workspace.yaml end with .yaml = config domain. 2 unrelated domains = WARNING.
notes: PR title says 'fix: cannot resize table editor columns on safari' but the bulk of changes are CI/lockfile updates bundled together. Classic scope creep.
